mapper.sql: id, setting_key, setting_group, display_name, setting_value, fallback_value, value_type, secret, editable, active, description, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM application_runtime_setting WHERE setting_key = #{settingKey} AND active = 1

SELECT FROM application_runtime_setting
AND active = 1 AND setting_group = #{settingGroup}
AND (setting_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY setting_group, setting_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application_runtime_setting (setting_key, setting_group, display_name, setting_value, fallback_value, value_type, secret, editable, active, description, updated_by) VALUES (#{settingKey}, #{settingGroup}, #{displayName}, #{settingValue}, #{fallbackValue}, #{valueType}, #{secret}, #{editable}, #{active}, #{description}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version_no), 0) + 1 FROM application_runtime_setting_history WHERE setting_key = #{settingKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application_runtime_setting_history (setting_id, setting_key, version_no, change_type, actor_user_id, before_value, after_value, before_fallback, after_fallback, before_snapshot, after_snapshot, reason) VALUES (#{settingId}, #{settingKey}, #{versionNo}, #{changeType}, #{actorUserId}, #{beforeValue}, #{afterValue}, #{beforeFallback}, #{afterFallback}, #{beforeSnapshot}, #{afterSnapshot}, #{reason})
